scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter desktop build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @aios/knowledge-graph build && pnpm --filter @aios/self-evolution build && pnpm --filter @aios/ai-core build && pnpm --filter @aios/mcp-adapters build && pnpm --filter @aios/orchestrator build && pnpm --filter @aios/core build
